# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Microservices VPC Template
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        Name: microservices-vpc

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties: {}

  VPCGatewayAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.GatewayId

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAssociation
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        Name: public-subnet-1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAssociation
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        Name: public-subnet-2

  NATGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocateElasticIp: 'true'
      SubnetId: !GetAtt PublicSubnet1.SubnetId

  EIPAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGatewaysEipAssociation
    Properties:
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway1
      SubnetId: !GetAtt PublicSubnet1.SubnetId

  RouteTablePublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        Name: public-route-table

  RouteToInternet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: RouteTablePublic
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePublic
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !GetAtt NATGateway1.NatGatewayId

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      Tags:
        Name: private-subnet-1

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
      Tags:
        Name: private-subnet-2
